name: CARAMEL CREATIONS

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Boxes of food on floor from date of 6/26/26.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Was at +200 ppm cl. Wet cloth sitting on prep table.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Prep table has deep cuts.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Prep table has deep scratches and needs replaced.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Need to use regular bleach-not low splash or scented. Was using low splash.

source_address: 2200 N MAPLE AVE STE 242, Rapid City
